channel.title: The Car Jury, News
channel.description: News and verdicts on the Indian car market from The Car Jury.

item.title: Renault confirms cheaper Duster automatics: about time, and still not enough
item.description: Renault Group India CEO Stephane Deblaise confirms more affordable Duster automatic variants are coming to plug the gap above the 1.0 manual range.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: BMW F 450 GS Accessory List: Cross-Spoke Wheels Cost Nearly Rs 1 Lakh
item.description: BMW F 450 GS accessory prices revealed in India. Cross-spoke wheels cost Rs 99,693, Rallye windshield starts at Rs 2,000. Full list and our verdict.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Skoda Kylaq Sportline Lands September 2026: Cosmetic Quick-Fix, Not the RS Hot-Hatch SUV You Wanted
item.description: Skoda confirms a Sportline trim for the Kylaq in September 2026. A 1.5 TSI is being considered but a full RS version is unlikely.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata Sierra EV Debuts June 30: The Harrier EV's Smaller, Smarter Sibling
item.description: Tata Motors will debut the Sierra EV on June 30, 2026, slotting between Curvv EV and Harrier EV with RWD and AWD options on acti.ev+.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Skoda Peaq for India: Flagship EV Bet Makes Sense Only as a Halo
item.description: Skoda is evaluating the Peaq electric SUV for India as a flagship, with a separate locally built EV in the works. Here is our verdict.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Kia Carens and Clavis cross 3 lakh sales: the Ertiga-Innova duopoly finally has a real third option
item.description: Kia Carens and Clavis cross 3 lakh cumulative sales in India by May 2026, ranking third in MPVs behind Ertiga and Innova. The Car Jury's take.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Mahindra's 15% June Output Cut Exposes a Supply Chain That Can't Match Demand
item.description: Mahindra's SUV production falls up to 15% in June 2026 as vendor labour shortages hit XUV 7XO and Thar output. The Car Jury's take on what it means.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: VW T-Cross Gets Rock In Rio Edition In Brazil While India's Taigun Gathers Dust
item.description: Volkswagen has launched a Rock In Rio special edition of the T-Cross (our Taigun) in Brazil. India, predictably, gets nothing of the sort.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Kia Sonet scores 1 star at Global NCAP, but it's the South Africa-spec car
item.description: India-made Kia Sonet scores 1 star for adult protection at Global NCAP, but the tested car is the dual-airbag South Africa export, not the India-spec.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Kia's June 2026 Discounts: Carnival Leads With Rs 1.5 Lakh Off
item.description: Kia is offering up to Rs 1.5 lakh off the Carnival in June 2026, with benefits also on Carens Clavis, Seltos, Sonet and Syros. Worth the wait?
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Maruti shields Alto, S-Presso, Celerio, WagonR buyers from price hike till June 14
item.description: Maruti Suzuki offers price protection on Alto K10, S-Presso, Celerio and WagonR for bookings made until June 14, 2026, against the recent hike.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Hyundai's Chennai Plant 1 Back to Normal by June 22, Retail Untouched
item.description: Hyundai expects Chennai Plant 1 to resume normal output by June 22 after a Mobis India supplier fire. Dealer stock cushions retail sales.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: 3rd Gen Audi Q7 Debuts With 600 PS And Camera-Based ADAS, India Launch Likely
item.description: Third-generation Audi Q7 breaks cover with V6 and V8 engines, up to 600 PS, Q9-derived cabin and Matrix LED lighting. India launch likely.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Renault Duster Crosses 5,000 Sales, Adds 3-Year Free Service Sweetener
item.description: Renault Duster crosses 5,000 bookings since March 2026 launch; brand adds 3 years free maintenance under Discovery Days till June 30, 2026.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Next-gen Hyundai i20 teased: connected LEDs in, but is India even in the plan?
item.description: Hyundai teases the fourth-gen i20 for Brazil with Y-shaped DRLs and connected LED tail lamps. A 2026 FIFA World Cup debut looks likely.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Haryana's EV Charger Mandate Is the Right Lever Pulled at the Right Time
item.description: Haryana now requires EV charging points in new and renovated housing societies, malls and offices. The Car Jury's verdict on what it means for buyers.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Puri Says Fuel Prices Will Cool: Petrol Buyers Should Not Bet The House On It
item.description: Petroleum Minister Hardeep Puri expects fuel prices to moderate after a Rs 7 per litre spike since mid-May. TCJ's read on what it means for buyers.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: BYD Seal U PHEV lands in India by end-2026: a 1200km flex on Toyota's hybrids
item.description: BYD Seal U PHEV launches in India by end-2026 with 1200km combined range and 200km EV-only mode. Here's what it means for hybrid buyers.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Hyundai Venue hits 8 lakh sales: third compact SUV to do it, and it is not slowing down
item.description: Hyundai Venue joins Maruti Brezza and Tata Nexon in the 8 lakh club, with the last 1 lakh units sold in just nine months. Here is what it means.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Maruti's 9-Car, 7-SUV Blitz in 3 Years: Volume Play, Not a Reinvention
item.description: Maruti will launch 9 new cars in 3 years, 7 of them SUVs, and cut development to 36 months. The Car Jury's verdict on what it means.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Nissan Gravite Gets Rs 18,000 Costlier: Still Cheaper Than Triber Twin
item.description: Nissan has raised Gravite prices by up to Rs 18,000 from June 2026. The sub-4m MPV still undercuts its Renault Triber twin on every trim.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: XUV 7XO Is Outrunning The XUV700: Mahindra's Rename Gamble Pays Off
item.description: Mahindra XUV 7XO has clocked 46,423 units in five months of 2026, outpacing the XUV700's run rate. Here is why the rename worked.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata Punch Flex Fuel E85 Spied: Tata Chases Maruti's Ethanol Move
item.description: Tata Punch facelift spied testing in camouflage, likely an E85 flex fuel mule, days after Maruti's Wagon R Flex Fuel reveal. Here is what it means for buyers.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Next-Gen Creta Becomes Global Kona in 2027: India Keeps the Name That Sells
item.description: Hyundai's next-gen SX3 SUV launches in 2027 as Kona globally and Creta in India, styled on the Crater Concept. The Car Jury's take.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata Tiago EV Facelift: Rs 1.15 Lakh Price Cut Finally Makes The Math Work
item.description: Tata Tiago EV facelift launches at Rs 6.99 lakh ex-showroom, down by up to Rs 1.15 lakh. Our verdict on whether it replaces your petrol hatchback.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Renault Kiger, Triber Get Up To Rs 80,000 Off In June 2026: Worth It?
item.description: Renault is offering up to Rs 80,000 off on the Kiger and benefits on the Triber and Kwid till June 15, 2026. Duster stays full price.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: BMW And MINI Get Pricier Again From July 2026: Second Hike This Year
item.description: BMW Group India will raise BMW and MINI prices by up to 2 percent from July 1, 2026, blaming a weaker rupee and logistics costs.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Hyundai May 2026: Venue Surges 56%, Creta Holds, But Honda Comparison Stings
item.description: Hyundai sold 47,837 units in May 2026, up 9% YoY. Venue jumped 56%, Creta crossed 15,000 units. Our verdict on what these numbers really mean.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Maruti Victoris Hits 1 Lakh Sales in 8 Months: Grand Vitara Now Has a Problem
item.description: Maruti Victoris crosses 1 lakh sales in just over eight months, beating the Grand Vitara and reshaping Maruti's mid-size SUV play.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Hyundai's Bayon-based SUV Spied: Another Fronx Rival India Doesn't Need
item.description: Hyundai's Bayon-based compact SUV (Bc4i) spied testing in India ahead of a Q2 FY27 launch to take on the Maruti Fronx and Toyota Taisor.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Maruti and Tata Bet on Hatchbacks Again as the SUV Party Cools
item.description: Maruti and Tata are pouring investment back into hatchbacks as SUV growth slows and entry buyers vanish. The Car Jury on why this matters.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Mahindra May 2026: Scorpio Leads, 7XO And XEV 9S Push Volumes To 58,021
item.description: Mahindra posted 58,021 PV sales in May 2026, up 10.66% YoY. Scorpio led at 15,774 units, Thar duo at 10,787. Here is what it means.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Maruti Victoris Gets Rs 90,000 Off In June 2026: Worth Grabbing?
item.description: Maruti Victoris strong hybrid attracts up to Rs 90,000 in June 2026 benefits. Swift, Brezza and Alto K10 also see discounts. The Car Jury's take.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Top 10 cars, May 2026: Maruti owns the podium, Tata holds the middle
item.description: Maruti Dzire, Fronx and Ertiga lock the top three sales ranks in May 2026, with Tata Punch and Nexon close behind. Full numbers and TCJ's verdict.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Germany's Car Factories Are Up For Grabs: China Or Tanks, Take Your Pick
item.description: Volkswagen and other German carmakers are exploring Chinese partners or defence firms to fill idle plants. Why Indian buyers should pay attention.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Fronx Sport Edition Lands In Malaysia At Rs 30.7 Lakh: Cosmetics Only, No India Plan
item.description: Suzuki Malaysia launches the Fronx Sport Edition at RM130,888 (Rs 30.70 lakh) with a body kit and blacked-out trim. No mechanical changes, no India launch.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Jeep Meridian, Compass Get Up To Rs 1.65 Lakh Off In June 2026
item.description: Jeep is offering up to Rs 1.65 lakh on the Meridian and Rs 1.5 lakh on the Compass in June 2026. Wrangler gets nothing, Grand Cherokee is sold out.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata's May 2026 Numbers: Sierra Lands At No. 3, Punch And Nexon Carry The Roof
item.description: Tata's May 2026 PV dispatches jumped 42% to 59,090 units, with Sierra debuting as the No. 3 seller behind Punch and Nexon.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Renault Duster TCe 100 Returns 19.41 km/l ARAI: Class-Leading, On Paper
item.description: Renault has certified the Duster Turbo TCe 100 at 19.41 km/l ARAI, the highest among turbo-petrol mid-size SUVs. Here is how it stacks up.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: New Tata Tiago Facelift: Still The Smart First-Car Pick At Rs 4.69 Lakh?
item.description: Tata Tiago facelift launches at Rs 4.69 lakh ex-showroom with five trims, refreshed cabin and updated petrol-CNG lineup. Here is The Car Jury's verdict.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: May 2026 Sales: Maruti's 43% Stranglehold Tells You Where The Money Is
item.description: Maruti Suzuki took 43% of May 2026 PV sales as the market grew 26% YoY. Tata and Mahindra followed. The Car Jury's take on what it means.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Renault Duster 1.0 Turbo Claims 19.41kpl: The Smart Pick of the Range
item.description: Renault Duster Turbo TCe 100 claims 19.41kpl ARAI, better than the 1.3 turbo. Priced from Rs 10.49 lakh, it is the value play of the range.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Delhi Opens India's First E85 Pump At Rs 82: Cheap Fuel, But Where Are The Cars?
item.description: India's first E85 fuel station opens in Delhi at Rs 82.12 per litre, Rs 20 cheaper than E20 petrol. The catch: almost no car on sale can run it.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Next-Gen Hyundai i20 Teased With Lambo-Style LEDs: India Wait Begins
item.description: Hyundai Brazil has teased the 4th-gen i20 with Y-shaped LED DRLs and a full-width light bar. Here is what it means for the Indian premium hatch.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: May 2026 Sales: Dzire Tops, Fronx Surges, Creta Holds the SUV Line
item.description: Top 10 cars and SUVs in May 2026: Maruti Dzire leads at 24,546 units, Fronx jumps 52%, Hyundai Creta stays strong in the SUV chart.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata EV Discounts June 2026: Harrier EV Cut By Rs 2.75 Lakh, Curvv EV By Rs 3.35 Lakh
item.description: Tata Motors slashes Harrier EV, Curvv EV, Nexon EV and outgoing Punch EV, Tiago EV prices by up to Rs 3.35 lakh in June 2026. The Car Jury verdict.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Mahindra XUV7XO Diesel AT AWD Mileage Test: Numbers That Justify the Bigger Engine
item.description: We drove the Mahindra XUV7XO Diesel Automatic AWD for 1,500 km across cities, highways and farm roads. Here is the real mileage verdict.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Next-Gen Hyundai i20 Teased: Curved Screens And ADAS Incoming, But Where's The Diesel Answer?
item.description: Hyundai teases the fourth-gen i20 ahead of its global debut next month, with sharper styling, curved displays and likely Level 2 ADAS on the cards.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Hyundai bets big on Tamil Nadu: 90% localisation and a mass-market EV by year-end
item.description: Hyundai will make Tamil Nadu its EV hub, push localisation to 90% by 2032, and launch its first mass-market dedicated EV from Chennai this year.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Hyundai Creta Gets Rs 1 Lakh Off In June 2026: Worth Grabbing Before Sierra Lands
item.description: Hyundai is offering up to Rs 1 lakh in benefits on the Creta petrol and N Line in June 2026. Diesel buyers get far less. Here is our take.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)
